title: acmella papposa var. macrophylla
intro: Acmella papposa var. macrophylla is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae), commonly known as toothache plant due to its traditional use in treating toothaches and other oral health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. The health benefits of Acmella papposa var. macrophylla include relief from toothache pain, reduction of inflammation, and improvement in overall oral health. Acmella papposa var. macrophylla can be prepared as a herbal remedy by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil, or by consuming it as a tincture.
